title: AstralAzeta's Emerald Tools
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b49cbb6bd260ddd26c2b1ce1a300f93a6641ace.png) [![Alt Text](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Discord-Button-64.png)](https://discord.gg/hFS6faY9tW) [![Alt Text](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Modrinth-Button-64.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/astralazetas-emerald-tools)
Emerald tools are stronger than iron tools, but weaker than diamond. They have worse durability, but better enchantability.
Recipes ![Emerald Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fda78012b284562e6c7fdfffb56fb1cf7d3b678d.png) ![Emerald Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd0cfba7f8c7144558760d0f8418ee9e2e572c6b.png) ![Emerald Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1c2dfc1aa82f5cb4c80202c82fe723d25bf69c5.png) ![Emerald Shovel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5e2aa1f1bd40c7444d55fa6f9de08ed134209e5.png) ![Emerald Hoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6239a6fa3cf81ba2031230dc9feedeeb83e7857.png)
